message:
fix: repair step for saved config validation jumps to correct wizard step

When a saved config fails validation, go_back() could land on the wrong
step.  Replace it with repair_step_for_saved_config() which routes to
DeployTarget or TargetConfig depending on what is already filled in.
Includes a regression test for the local-deploy missing-output case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
